summary: System Status and the menu bar now detect real memory pressure — free RAM, swap, and compression — and suggest quit, purge, or restart before acting.
introduced: Memory pressure tiers — Normal through Critical based on free RAM, swap usage, memory compressor, and WindowServer CPU (typing lag indicator)
Tiered relief actions — purge cache for moderate pressure, quit the worst heavy app for high/critical, restart when swap is accumulated
Confirm before cleanup — System Status and menu bar ask before freeing memory, quitting an offender, or requesting restart
changed: Health score factors in swap and free pages, not just memory used %
Notifications when pressure is High or Critical, with tier-specific titles (quit app, restart recommended)
System Status details show free RAM, swap, and compressed memory
